## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what changed and why. -->

## Linkage

- **Engagement phase:** Assess / Design / Deployment / Review-and-Release / Innersource
- **Audit control(s):** e.g. `B.3.2`, `A.2.2`
- **Related issue(s):** #

## Type of change

- [ ] Control wording / evidence clarification (Module A or B page)
- [ ] Engagement playbook content (questionnaire, workshop, WAF, MAP, DoD)
- [ ] Reference architecture (hub-spoke / VWAN / secure edge / multi-region / PaaS / hybrid / LZ)
- [ ] Deliverable template (HLD / LLD / Runbook / KT / Hypercare)
- [ ] Engagement Agent update
- [ ] Innersource governance / repo plumbing
- [ ] Typo / broken link / minor docs fix

## Verification

- [ ] `npm install` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] MDX rules followed (`.github/memories/mdx-content.md`) — `<` escaped, filenames dot-free
- [ ] If evidence wording changed, `.github/scripts/create-issues.sh` updated to match
- [ ] No customer-identifying content (anonymised as Customer A / B / C)
- [ ] No secrets, tenant IDs, or credentials

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to. -->
